item.title: 808 Burger Challenge
item.description: Watch the 808 Burger Challenge, featuring oversized burgers, eating strategy, and the excitement of completing a large, flavorful meal under the clock.

media:content.media:title: 808 Burger Challenge
media:content.media:description: Watch the 808 Burger Challenge, featuring oversized burgers, eating strategy, and the excitement of completing a large, flavorful meal under the clock.

item.title: Double Decker Pizza Challenge
item.description: Take on the double decker pizza challenge, featuring a massive layered pizza and testing speed, strategy, and endurance to finish this epic meal.

media:content.media:title: Double Decker Pizza Challenge
media:content.media:description: Take on the double decker pizza challenge, featuring a massive layered pizza and testing speed, strategy, and endurance to finish this epic meal.

item.title: Club Sandwich Challenge
item.description: Watch a club sandwich challenge, testing speed and strategy to finish a stacked sandwich while showcasing technique and competitive eating skills.

media:content.media:title: Club Sandwich Challenge
media:content.media:description: Watch a club sandwich challenge, testing speed and strategy to finish a stacked sandwich while showcasing technique and competitive eating skills.

item.title: Cooking and Tasting Fish Outdoors
item.description: Learn how to cook and enjoy freshly caught fish outdoors, highlighting preparation techniques, flavors, and the experience of eating in a natural setting.

media:content.media:title: Cooking and Tasting Fish Outdoors
media:content.media:description: Learn how to cook and enjoy freshly caught fish outdoors, highlighting preparation techniques, flavors, and the experience of eating in a natural setting.

item.title: 7 lb BBQ Challenge in 45 Minutes
item.description: Take on a 7-pound BBQ challenge, testing speed and strategy to finish a massive portion of barbecue in just 45 minutes.

media:content.media:title: 7 lb BBQ Challenge in 45 Minutes
media:content.media:description: Take on a 7-pound BBQ challenge, testing speed and strategy to finish a massive portion of barbecue in just 45 minutes.

item.title: Massive Cheesburgers and Fast Eating
item.description: Watch a fast-eating challenge featuring massive cheeseburgers, highlighting speed, strategy, and the effort required to tackle oversized meals.

media:content.media:title: Massive Cheesburgers and Fast Eating
media:content.media:description: Watch a fast-eating challenge featuring massive cheeseburgers, highlighting speed, strategy, and the effort required to tackle oversized meals.

item.title: Kayak Adventure
item.description: Join a kayak adventure, exploring scenic waterways, paddling techniques, and the excitement of navigating rivers and lakes in an outdoor setting.

media:content.media:title: Kayak Adventure
media:content.media:description: Join a kayak adventure, exploring scenic waterways, paddling techniques, and the excitement of navigating rivers and lakes in an outdoor setting.

item.title: Food Showdown
item.description: Watch an intense food showdown, featuring competitive eating, large portions, and strategies to tackle various dishes in a fast-paced challenge.

media:content.media:title: Food Showdown
media:content.media:description: Watch an intense food showdown, featuring competitive eating, large portions, and strategies to tackle various dishes in a fast-paced challenge.
